label: SES-122 / CNV-024 close-out — implements and resolves PI-101 (harden close-out pre-flight validator: required executive_summary + status-case + required-field checks). One commit 947da63. No decisions. Attaches to WS-011. Resolves PI-101. Identifiers re-verify at apply time.

session.session_title: Implement PI-101 — harden the close-out pre-flight validator (required fields + status-case enforcement)
session.session_description:
Single Claude Code execution at Doug's terminal. CNV-024. Parent workstream WS-011 (V2 storage API refinements). Medium: chat (claude_code runner).

Seed: "lets do pi-101" (selected as the next item; PI-101 was surfaced earlier this session when the close-out pre-flight validator caught two over-length executive summaries in the PI-031 close-out).

PI-101 hardens the PI-090 close-out validator (crmbuilder-v2/scripts/closeout_validator.py) to reject the two SES-110-class defects it previously let through as warnings only: missing required fields (executive_summary, now NOT NULL on sessions/decisions/planning_items since PI-075) and wrong-case status values (work_ticket_status 'Ready' vs the lowercase enum 'ready').

Delivered in one commit (947da63):
1. executive_summary is now REQUIRED, not merely length-checked. _check_one_exec_summary gained a required flag (default True); an absent/null/empty value on the session, a decision, or a planning_item is a hard error (check_name executive_summary_required) instead of silently passing. This is the exact SES-110 missing-field class that 500s on apply.
2. New check 11 (check_status_values): validates session/conversation/work_ticket/planning_item status against the live vocab sets imported from vocab.py. Because the vocab encodes the correct case, a wrong-case value is rejected exactly like an unknown one (catching the SES-110 work_ticket_status 'Ready' 422). Decisions remain covered by check 4. Only fires on a present value, so a missing status doesn't double-report.
3. New check 12 (check_required_fields): identifier/title/status presence on decisions and planning_items, closing the remaining missing-required-field holes.

The status vocab sets (SESSION/CONVERSATION/WORK_TICKET/PLANNING_ITEM_STATUSES) are imported live from vocab.py with the module's existing authored-time fallback, so the validator never drifts from the access-layer enums.

Test updates: the exec-summary absent/null tests now assert rejection (the behavior reversal PI-101 mandates); the _valid_payload() fixture gains the now-required executive summaries; the known-good real-payload template moved from ses_107 (pre-PI-075, no exec summaries, now correctly fails) to ses_116 (compliant). Added status-value and required-field coverage. 56 validator tests and the full 114-test scripts suite pass; ruff clean. Verified end-to-end against the loaded module: a payload with a missing decision exec summary, work_ticket_status 'Ready', a wrong-case PI status, and a missing PI title yields four targeted errors, while clean ses_116 yields zero. This close-out is itself validated by the hardened checks at apply time.

No decisions authored (well-scoped implementation, not a choice between alternatives). Resolves PI-101. The commit sits on main awaiting Doug's push (Claude Code push convention).
session.session_executive_summary: Implemented PI-101 in one commit (947da63): hardened the close-out pre-flight validator to reject the two SES-110-class defects it previously let through. executive_summary is now REQUIRED on sessions, decisions, and planning_items — an absent/null/empty value is a hard error. New check 11 validates every status-bearing entity's status against the live vocab sets, so a wrong-case value like work_ticket_status 'Ready' is rejected like an unknown one; new check 12 enforces identifier/title/status presence on decisions and planning_items. Tests reversed the old absent/null-passes assertions, repointed the real-payload template to ses_116, and added coverage; 56 validator and 114 scripts tests pass, ruff clean, verified end-to-end. Resolves PI-101.

conversation.conversation_purpose: Extend the PI-090 close-out validator to reject missing required fields (executive_summary) and wrong-case status values at pre-flight, removing the manual-retry churn of the SES-110 defect class.
conversation.conversation_description: Hardened closeout_validator.py: required executive_summary (was optional-length-only), a new status-value check validating against live vocab (catches wrong-case like work_ticket_status 'Ready'), and a required-field presence check for decisions/planning_items. Updated tests (reversed absent/null assertions, repointed the real-payload template to ses_116, added new coverage). One commit 947da63. Resolves PI-101.

commits.commit_message_first_line: v2: PI-101 — harden close-out pre-flight validator (required fields + status case)
commits.commit_message_full:
v2: PI-101 — harden close-out pre-flight validator (required fields + status case)

Closes the two gaps the SES-110 apply exposed, which the validator
previously let through as warnings-only:

1. executive_summary is now REQUIRED (not merely length-checked) on
   sessions, decisions, and planning_items — NOT NULL since PI-075.
   An absent/null/empty value is a hard error (check 9,
   executive_summary_required), the exact missing-field class that
   500s on apply.
2. New check 11 (check_status_values): every status-bearing entity's
   status is validated against its live vocab set imported from
   vocab.py. Because the vocab encodes the correct case, a wrong-case
   value (work_ticket_status "Ready" vs "ready" — the SES-110 422)
   is rejected exactly like an unknown value. Covers session,
   conversation, work_ticket, planning_item; decisions stay in check 4.
3. New check 12 (check_required_fields): identifier/title/status
   presence for decisions and planning_items.

Status sets (SESSION/CONVERSATION/WORK_TICKET/PLANNING_ITEM_STATUSES)
are imported live from vocab.py with the same authored-time fallback
the module already uses, so the validator never drifts from the
access-layer enums.

Tests: the exec-summary absent/null tests now assert rejection (the
behavior reversal PI-101 mandates); the _valid_payload() fixture gains
the now-required exec summaries; the real-payload template moves from
ses_107 (pre-PI-075, no exec summaries) to ses_116 (compliant). Adds
status-value and required-field test coverage. 56 validator / 114
scripts tests green; ruff clean. Verified end-to-end: a payload with a
missing decision exec summary, work_ticket_status "Ready", a wrong-case
PI status, and a missing PI title yields 4 targeted errors; clean
ses_116 yields 0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
